scripts.test: bun fetch:fixtures && bun build:local && bun build:wasm && bun typecheck && bun test:parser && bun test:codegen && bun test:ast && bun test:analyzer && bun test:wasm && bun test:sourcemap
scripts.gen:npm: zig build gen-parser-decoder && cp ./zig-out/decode.js ./npm/yuku-parser && zig build gen-codegen-encoder && cp ./zig-out/encode.js ./npm/yuku-codegen && zig build gen-analyzer-decoder && cp ./zig-out/decode-analyzer.js ./npm/yuku-analyzer/decode.js && cp ./src/parser/ffi/analyzer.d.ts ./npm/yuku-analyzer/index.d.ts && zig build gen-walk-tables && cp ./zig-out/walk-tables.ts ./npm/yuku-ast/src/generated.ts && bun run --cwd npm/yuku-ast build
scripts.gen:wasm: zig build gen-parser-decoder && zig build gen-codegen-encoder && zig build gen-analyzer-decoder && cp ./zig-out/bin/yuku-parser.wasm ./zig-out/decode.js ./npm/yuku-parser-wasm/ && cp ./npm/yuku-parser/index.d.ts ./npm/yuku-parser-wasm/ && cp ./zig-out/bin/yuku-codegen.wasm ./zig-out/encode.js ./npm/yuku-codegen-wasm/ && cp ./zig-out/bin/yuku-analyzer.wasm ./npm/yuku-analyzer-wasm/ && cp ./zig-out/decode-analyzer.js ./npm/yuku-analyzer-wasm/decode.js && cp ./npm/yuku-analyzer/index.js ./npm/yuku-analyzer/analyzer.js ./npm/yuku-analyzer/module.js ./npm/yuku-analyzer/walk.js ./npm/yuku-analyzer/index.d.ts ./npm/yuku-analyzer-wasm/
